title: SpeedyGhast
description: Faster Happy Ghast Flight with Soul Speed Boots
body:
# 👻 SpeedyGhast

## 🚀 Take Flight with Speed!

**SpeedyGhast** is a server-side Fabric mod for **Minecraft 1.21.6+** that supercharges your **Happy Ghast** riding experience!

## 📦 Requirements

- **[Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)** – Required.
- **[Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)** – Required for configuration handling.
- (Optional) **[Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)** – For in-game configuration.

## ✨ Features

*   **⚡ Super Speed**: Equip **Soul Speed** enchanted boots to fly faster!
*   **🆙 Level Based**: Higher Soul Speed levels = Higher Flight Speeds!
    *   Soul Speed I: **1.5x**
    *   Soul Speed II: **2.0x**
    *   Soul Speed III: **2.5x**
*   **🛠️ Fully Configurable**: Adjust base speed and multipliers to your liking.
*   **🔌 Server-Side Only**: Clients do not need to install anything!
*   **🎮 Mod Menu Support**: Optional in-game configuration if Mod Menu is installed.

## 🎮 Usage

1.  **Tame & Ride**: Find yourself a friendly **Happy Ghast**.
2.  **Gear Up**: Put on your boots with **Soul Speed**.
3.  **Zoom**: Take off and enjoy the boost!

## ⚙️ Configuration

The config file is located at `config/speedyghast.json`.

| Option | Default | Description |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| `base_speed` | `0.05` | Default flying speed of the Happy Ghast |
| `speed_multiplier.level_1` | `1.5` | Multiplier for Soul Speed I |
| `speed_multiplier.level_2` | `2.0` | Multiplier for Soul Speed II |
| `speed_multiplier.level_3` | `2.5` | Multiplier for Soul Speed III |
| `check_interval` | `20` | Speed update check interval in ticks (20 = 1s) |

---
